name: Sweet'n'sour Cocktail Wieners
recipeIngredient: 1 pound frankfurters, Vienna Sausages or wieners
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the prepared mustard and currant jelly in a chafing dish or double boiler until well combined.
2. Diagonally slice the frankfurters into bite-sized pieces.
3. Add the sliced frankfurters to the sauce and heat through until heated thoroughly.
4. Makes 8 servings.
